title: SpaceX cleared to fly Starship again after booster failure in May
summary: SpaceX has received clearance to resume Starship test flights following a booster failure in May. This will be the company's first test as a public entity, serving as a market test for its iterative "fly, fail, fix" development philosophy.
content: This will be the first Starship test flight for SpaceX as a public company, testing the market's appetite for the company's "fly, fail, fix" approach to rocket development, which often ends in fireballs.

zh.title: SpaceX在5月推进器失败后获准再次进行星舰飞行测试
zh.summary: SpaceX已获得许可在5月推进器失败后恢复星舰测试飞行。这将是该公司作为上市实体的首次测试，充当其迭代"飞行、失败、修复"开发理念的市场测试。

title: Waze adds new AI-powered features and customization updates
summary: Waze is introducing new AI-powered features built on Google's Gemini assistant as part of Google's broader push to integrate Gemini across its products. The updates aim to strengthen Waze's competitive position against Apple Maps and other navigation rivals.
content: Some of the new features are powered by Google's Gemini AI assistant, which reflects the the tech giant's broader push to integrate Gemini across its products while also better positioning Waze to compete with rival services such as Apple Maps.

zh.title: Waze推出新的AI驱动功能和定制更新
zh.summary: Waze正在推出基于谷歌Gemini助手的新AI驱动功能，这是谷歌在其产品中推广Gemini的更广泛计划的一部分。这些更新旨在加强Waze相对于Apple Maps和其他导航竞争对手的竞争优势。

title: LAPD lets contract with surveillance giant Flock expire, citing ‘serious concerns’ over civil liberties and privacy
summary: The Los Angeles Police Department has ended its contract with surveillance technology provider Flock citing civil liberties and privacy concerns. The decision represents a major blow to Flock, which counted LAPD as one of its largest government customers.
content: The LAPD, one of Flock's biggest government customers, is ending its contract with the company citing civil liberties concerns.

zh.title: 洛杉矶警察局因公民自由和隐私问题未与监视巨头Flock续约
zh.summary: 洛杉矶警察局以公民自由和隐私顾虑为由，终止了与监视技术提供商Flock的合同。该决定对Flock是一个重大打击，该公司曾将洛杉矶警察局列为其最大的政府客户之一。

title: Uber’s robotaxi lobbying effort puts it on a collision course with Waymo
summary: Uber and Waymo are engaged in an escalating lobbying battle in Washington, D.C. over competing visions for autonomous vehicle regulation and deployment. The conflict highlights the two companies' divergent strategies as they compete for robotaxi market leadership.
content: Washington, D.C. has become a battleground for Uber and Waymo's competing views.

zh.title: 优步的出租车游说努力与Waymo走向对立
zh.summary: 优步和Waymo在华盛顿特区进行了一场升级的游说之战，围绕自动驾驶汽车监管和部署的竞争愿景展开。这一冲突突出了两家公司在争夺机器人出租车市场领导地位时的不同战略。

title: This free Mac app reveals the truth about your mystery USB-C cables
summary: WhatCable is a free Mac app that tests USB-C cables by analyzing data from Apple Silicon Macs to determine their speed and power capabilities. The tool provides a convenient and cost-free alternative to discontinued cable testing devices.
content:
WhatCable. | Photo by Sean Hollister / The Verge	

Nearly three years ago, I showed you an awesome $8 cable tester that quickly tells you if your USB-C cable is likely fast, slow, powerful, or weak. Sadly, that gadget got discontinued, and I've never found anything as intuitive or inexpensive since. But if you've got a Mac with Apple Silicon chips, you can simply download an even more impressive tester for free. 
It's called WhatCable, and it works by reading the data your Mac already collects about attached USB devices, data that Apple doesn't normally pass along to you. Just click a little widget that lives in the menu bar atop your Mac, and you can see every USB-C cable and device attach …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 这个免费的Mac应用程序揭示了你神秘USB-C电缆的真相
zh.summary: WhatCable是一个免费的Mac应用程序，通过分析Apple Silicon Mac的数据来测试USB-C电缆，以确定其速度和功率能力。该工具为已停产的电缆测试设备提供了便捷且免费的替代方案。

title: Social media limits are coming for teens across Europe
summary: The EU is considering sweeping restrictions on teens' social media access, including age limits and potential outright bans, requiring platforms to prove their services are not harmful before minors can use them. EU Commission President Ursula von der Leyen indicated new legislation could be proposed within months, marking a major regulatory shift toward protecting young people from social media platforms.
content:
The European Union is weighing sweeping new restrictions on children's and teenagers' access to social media, including age limits, an outright ban, and phased access. Social media platforms could also be forced to prove their services are not harmful before young people are allowed to use them.
European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen said the bloc's executive arm could propose new legislation within months, after reviewing recommendations from a panel of experts released today. "This is not about whether children can access social media. It is about when social media can access our children," von der Leyen said. 
The panel reco …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 欧洲即将对青少年的社交媒体使用进行限制
zh.summary: 欧盟正在考虑对青少年的社交媒体使用进行全面限制,包括年龄限制和潜在的全面禁令,要求平台在未成年人使用其服务前证明其服务无害。欧盟委员会主席乌苏拉·冯德莱恩表示,新立法可能在数月内提出,标志着在保护年轻人免受社交媒体平台影响方面迈出重大监管转变。

title: Waze is getting a bunch of new AI-powered features
summary: Google is integrating its Gemini AI assistant into Waze to enhance trip personalization through conversational voice commands for reporting traffic incidents and map updates. The update introduces new features like Destination Search, enabling drivers to find nearby locations using natural language requests while maintaining focus on driving.
content:
Waze is getting an AI makeover. Google is integrating its flagship AI assistant, Gemini, into the driving app with the goal of letting users personalize their trips a little more. 
Of the four new updates, only two are being described as involving Gemini. Waze says its updating its conversation reporting feature, first introduced in 2024, to allow drivers to use conversational voice commands to report traffic incidents and suggest map updates, like a road closure or outdated house number. In addition, Waze introduced Destination Search, enabling drivers to use (again) use conversation voice commands (e.g., "Find me a coffee shop that's open …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Waze 将推出多项新的人工智能功能
zh.summary: 谷歌正在将其Gemini AI助手集成到Waze中,以通过对话式语音命令报告交通事件和地图更新来增强行程个性化。该更新引入了目的地搜索等新功能,使驾驶员能够使用自然语言请求查找附近的位置,同时保持对驾驶的专注。
